question_text: A book is resting on a table. Which of the following is true about the forces acting on the book?

options.label: A
options.text: The weight of the book is greater than the normal force from the table

options.label: B
options.text: The weight of the book and the normal force from the table are equal in size and opposite in direction

options.label: C
options.text: There is only one force acting on the book, which is its weight

options.label: D
options.text: The normal force is larger than the weight because it must support the book

explanation: When an object is stationary, the forces acting on it are balanced. The upward normal force from the table exactly balances the downward weight of the book, so the resultant force is zero and the book remains at rest.
